name: Cheesecake Cookies Cyberealm
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. For the crust, blend together softened butter (5 T), packed brown sugar (1/3 c), and flour (1 c) until mixture resembles course crumbs. Press half of the mixture into an 8x8 inch baking dish.
3. Bake the crust for 15 minutes.
4. For the filling, beat cream cheese (8 oz), sugar (1/2 c), egg, milk (1 T), lemon juice (1 T), and vanilla extract (1/2 t) until smooth.
5. Spread the filling over the baked crust and sprinkle with remaining brown sugar mixture.
6. Bake for an additional 25 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely before chilling for at least 1 hour.
8. Cut into 16 squares and serve.
